title: Omniprobe
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Omniprobes''' were special devices that were designed to counteract [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droids]] by tracking them down and neutralizing them.

[[Ken]] deviced a particularly efficient omniprobe as a homework assignment under the tutelage of [[DJ-88]]. The Alliance later employed this omniprobe on their [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] base to reduce Imperial incursions.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Lost City of the Jedi]]'' {{1st}} {{Mo}}
*[[Prophets of the Dark Side (novel)|''Prophets of the Dark Side'']]

==Sources==
